periods.name: Tonight
periods.detailedForecast: Showers and thunderstorms before midnight, then patchy fog and showers and thunderstorms. Some of the storms could produce heavy rain. Cloudy, with a low around 60. Southwest wind 5 to 8 mph. Chance of precipitation is 100%.

periods.name: Thursday
periods.shortForecast: Patchy Fog then Chance Showers And Thunderstorms
periods.detailedForecast: Patchy fog and showers and thunderstorms before 10am, then a chance of showers and thunderstorms. Mostly cloudy, with a high near 72. South southwest wind 6 to 9 mph. Chance of precipitation is 90%.

periods.name: Thursday Night
periods.detailedForecast: A chance of showers and thunderstorms before 1am, then a chance of showers and thunderstorms between 1am and 2am, then a slight chance of showers and thunderstorms between 2am and 3am, then patchy fog between 3am and 5am. Mostly cloudy. Low around 60, with temperatures rising to around 62 overnight. South wind 3 to 8 mph. Chance of precipitation is 30%.

periods.name: Friday
periods.shortForecast: Partly Sunny then Chance Rain Showers
periods.detailedForecast: A chance of rain showers after noon. Partly sunny, with a high near 77. South southwest wind 9 to 15 mph, with gusts as high as 26 mph. Chance of precipitation is 30%.

periods.name: Friday Night
periods.detailedForecast: A slight chance of rain showers before midnight, then showers and thunderstorms likely. Mostly cloudy, with a low around 61. South southwest wind around 14 mph, with gusts as high as 24 mph. Chance of precipitation is 70%.

periods.name: Saturday
periods.detailedForecast: Showers and thunderstorms. Mostly cloudy, with a high near 69. West wind 8 to 13 mph, with gusts as high as 21 mph. Chance of precipitation is 80%.

periods.name: Saturday Night
periods.detailedForecast: A slight chance of rain showers before midnight. Mostly cloudy, with a low around 44. North wind 2 to 7 mph.

periods.name: Sunday
periods.detailedForecast: Mostly sunny, with a high near 65. Southeast wind around 5 mph.

periods.name: Sunday Night
periods.detailedForecast: Mostly clear, with a low around 50. South southwest wind around 5 mph.

periods.detailedForecast: A slight chance of rain showers after 1pm. Mostly sunny, with a high near 75. South southwest wind 5 to 12 mph, with gusts as high as 18 mph.

periods.detailedForecast: A slight chance of rain showers before 7pm, then a chance of showers and thunderstorms. Partly cloudy, with a low around 62. South southwest wind around 10 mph, with gusts as high as 20 mph.

periods.detailedForecast: A chance of showers and thunderstorms before 7am, then showers and thunderstorms likely. Mostly cloudy, with a high near 77. South southwest wind 10 to 16 mph, with gusts as high as 29 mph.
